description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Snapshots that runs on push to master, imgui, and WIP-keyboard-stuff branches, and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple environments including ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-22.04, macos-12, and windows-latest, with different CPU architectures and build flavours. For each job, check out the repository, perform preparations for signing binaries on Darwin builds if needed, and then perform the actual build using a custom action.
